bio: PMP-certified with 8 years leading enterprise software delivery at Fortune 500 companies. I've failed projects, saved failing projects, and built world-class PM teams. I mentor because I wish someone had done this for me when I was starting out.
speciality: PMP exam prep and Agile transformation in enterprise environments

reviews.author: Priya S.
reviews.text: Marcus gave me clarity I couldn't find anywhere else. After 2 sessions I had a solid 6-month study plan.

reviews.author: Jordan L.
reviews.text: Incredibly direct and generous. He helped me land my first PM internship at Google.

sessionTypes.name: Introduction Call
sessionTypes.desc: Get to know each other, define your goals

sessionTypes.name: Study Strategy Session
sessionTypes.desc: Build your personalised PMP study plan

bio: 15 years managing large-scale government and healthcare transformation programmes. PhD in Organisational Change. I specialise in helping PMs navigate complex stakeholder environments and regulatory compliance.
speciality: High-stakes government and healthcare PM, risk management at scale

reviews.author: Tom K.
reviews.text: Dr. Hassan's depth of knowledge is extraordinary. She helped me navigate a very complex NHS project.

bio: Former UX designer turned PM at two successful startups. I know exactly what it feels like to be an outsider trying to break into PM — because I was one. I focus on practical steps: portfolio building, interview prep, and getting your first PM role.
speciality: Transitioning into PM from non-technical backgrounds

reviews.author: Emma W.
reviews.text: Lisa completely changed how I approach interviews. Got my first PM role 3 months after working with her.

sessionTypes.name: Career Switch Strategy
sessionTypes.desc: Map your path from current role to PM

bio: Certified Scrum Master with 6 years running distributed teams across Africa, Europe, and the Americas. Expert in remote-first PM practices, async communication, and NGO project delivery with tight budgets.
speciality: Remote PM, distributed team management, NGO/social impact projects

reviews.author: Sofia M.
reviews.text: James is the only mentor who truly understood the challenges of managing remote teams across time zones.

bio: 10+ years at Google, Stripe, and two unicorn startups. PMP and SAFe certified. I've built and led global PM teams and now focus on mentoring the next generation of tech PMs. Known for practical, no-fluff guidance.
speciality: Tech PM career growth, PMP prep, OKR frameworks, leading PM teams

reviews.author: Marcus J.
reviews.text: Sarah's advice helped me make the jump from mid-level to senior PM in 6 months.

reviews.author: Priya S.
reviews.text: The most practical mentor I've worked with. Everything she says is immediately actionable.
